description: Phase B1 — long plain completion prompt (no special tokens, ~95 tokens). Tests whether length alone triggers the divergence.
prompts: France is a country located primarily in Western Europe, with several overseas regions and territories. Its capital and largest city is Paris, located in the north on the Seine river. The official language is French, and the country uses the euro as its currency. France borders Belgium, Luxembourg, Germany, Switzerland, Monaco, Italy, Andorra, and Spain. Famous landmarks include the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre Museum, and the Palace of Versailles. The capital of France is
